permissions.allow: Bash(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "SELECT term, LEFT\(definition, 200\) as definition FROM dictionary_entries WHERE term_lower = 'trust' OR term_lower = 'habeas corpus' OR term_lower = 'lien' OR term_lower = 'mortgage' OR term_lower = 'estoppel' LIMIT 5;" 2>&1222)
Bash(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "SELECT term, LEFT\(definition, 200\) as definition FROM dictionary_entries WHERE term_lower LIKE 'trust%' ORDER BY term LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)
Bash(fuser 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null || echo "no fuser"; ps aux | grep "tsx server" | grep -v grep)
Bash(which npx && npx --yes playwright --version 2>&1 || echo "no playwright"2)
Bash(ls *.db 2>/dev/null; ls data/*.db 2>/dev/null; ls *.sqlite* 2>/dev/null; find /home/runner/workspace -name "*.db" -o -name "*.sqlite*" 2>/dev/null | head -5)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/dictionary/search?q=remedy&limit=3" 2>/dev/null | npx -y json -a term termLower 2>/dev/null || curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/dictionary/search?q=remedy&limit=3" | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(e['term']\) for e in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" 2>/dev/null)
